Adhesive Plastic Sliding Discs in Gray 4 Pack (Set of 4) Add to Cart Ellieana 60'' Stone Top Console Table Add to Cart At a Glance Solid Wood Base Solid Wood Assembly Required Description About This Product Whether you are creating a monochromatic palette in your living room or you simply crave a dynamic-looking wooden coffee table with ample surface area for entertaining guests, this handcrafted piece is sure to exceed your expectations. Crafted from solid mango wood, this coffee table features a soft, it's finish enhances the wood's natural figure while complimenting any variety of interior color schemes. The oblong top provides ample surface space for entertaining guests or displaying your favorite decorations. It sits upon one finely crafted spherical and one triangular block base to turn the coffee table into a work of modern art. Place it in front of your sofa or chair set for a convenient spot to place coffee, remotes, a few coffee table books, and more. Features 38L x 24W x 15.5H, in inches One artistic coffee table Handcrafted from durable premium grade mango wood 2 Inch thick oblong top Clean rounded edges for minimalist appeal Ball legs are made up of a 7 inch base diameter sphere and a high triangular base for a dramatic effect Complements a wide variety of interior decor styles from cottage to modern to Scandinavian to transitional Convenient floor protectors prevent wobbling as well as scratches and abrasions Quick and easy assembly required Includes natural variation in color, finish which may vary due to several different factors Every piece is sustainably crafted to protect the planet we share Show More Specifications Return Policy Compare Similar Items Sale Janaan 38 Inch Coffee Table, Oblong Mango Wood Top with a Modern Ball Leg $479.99 was $669.99 (13) Rated 4.5 out of 5 stars.13 total votes Current Item Add to Cart 51" Oval Cream Black Brown Modern Coffee Table with Three Round Legs $659.99 was $769.99 (39) Rated 4.7 out of 5 stars.39 total votes Add to Cart Laylla Modern 54" Coffee Table, Sintered Stone Table-top, 3 Stainless Steel legs, Free form $579.99 (75) Rated 4.7 out of 5 stars.75 total votes Add to Cart Four-Day Flash Sale Caomhan Block Coffee Table $165.99 was $301.00 (1404) Rated 4.3 out of 5 stars.1404 total votes Add to Cart Four-Day Flash Sale Iver Solid Wood Single Coffee Table $685.00 was $888.00 (268) Rated 4.7 out of 5 stars.268 total votes Add to Cart Four-Day Flash Sale Leviah 40'' W Round Drum Coffee Table $387.00 (236) Rated 4.8 out of 5 stars.236 total votes Add to Cart Customer Reviews 4.5 Rated 4.5 out of 5 stars. 13 Reviews 10 5 star reviews 5 10 1 4 star review 4 1 1 3 star review 3 1 1 2 star review 2 1 0 1 star reviews 1 0 Showing 1-10 of 13 reviews Filter by keyword Most relevant Sort By Rated 5 out of 5 stars.
